critical_issues.title: cd-infra deployment used undefined DATA_STORAGE_ACCOUNT_NAME
critical_issues.recommendation: Resolve DATA_STORAGE_ACCOUNT_NAME before az deployment and fail fast if missing.

critical_issues.title: OIDC identifier sourcing inconsistent across workflows
critical_issues.recommendation: Use vars.AZURE_* for azure/login OIDC IDs across workflows and remove secret fallbacks.

critical_issues.title: OIDC identifier sourcing inconsistent across workflows
critical_issues.recommendation: Use vars.AZURE_* for azure/login OIDC IDs across workflows and remove secret fallbacks.

critical_issues.title: OIDC identifier sourcing inconsistent across workflows
critical_issues.recommendation: Use vars.AZURE_* for azure/login OIDC IDs across workflows and remove secret fallbacks.

suggestions.title: Add CI regression guard for secret-based OIDC ID usage
suggestions.recommendation: Fail CI when workflows reference secrets.AZURE_CLIENT_ID/TENANT_ID/SUBSCRIPTION_ID for azure/login.

suggestions.title: Capture explicit evidence for gitleaks and portal verification
suggestions.recommendation: Record security validation evidence and track portal-side anonymous access confirmation as manual follow-up.

suggestions.title: Keep CI OIDC guard for vars-only Azure login IDs
Consider workflow lint tooling for future regression prevention
